horoscope: You can find yourself frequently sorting through recent experiences these days, dear Aries, with Mercury in your solar twelfth house for an extended stay. It can feel like you're often in a processing or digesting phase. Others could find you less talkative or even secretive at times. Your ideas are in a developmental stage, and you intuitively sense that you shouldn’t share them until they (and you) are ready. Now that Mars is in your sign, however, you're more active and a little more direct. Still, meeting your responsibilities is important for emotional satisfaction for much of today. It’s a simple concept, but a powerful one, as the Moon transits the top of your solar chart. It’s best to make room for both serious and whimsical ideas. Seek out different ways to satisfy your curiosity. Later today, stepping out of your comfort zone comes naturally. You might reach out to others or express a hidden side of yourself. You are more aware of the things that you can bring to the world.

You can be inspired by the feedback you receive from sharing ideas, skills, talents, or knowledge with others now, dear Taurus. You’re entertaining unique ideas, and your conversation is particularly witty and insightful. You’re connecting with your own needs for happiness, whether it's a cause, a relationship, or a personal interest, and you're motivated to do your best. With Mars now in a behind-the-scenes sector of your solar chart, there’s a tendency to put more effort into closing projects or renewal and recuperation. Still, as the day advances, you tend to be more aware of the impact you’re making, and a strong desire to make plans or meet your goals is building.

With Mercury spending longer than usual in your solar tenth house, dear Gemini, you're often thinking and making decisions about your life direction, major life transitions, business, or career path these days. There is much to absorb and take in now, and today, you’re prepared to talk things through as well as listen to advice and information coming in. You’re doing more problem-solving, list-making, and sorting things out. It’s a fine time to generate ideas and share or uncover useful information. Later today, creative self-expression comes easily and naturally. You are attracting positive, happy, and forward-looking people into your life right now. Current relationships are becoming spicier. You might inspire somebody with an idea or a unique perspective on a matter today.

You may be looking to expand your knowledge and mental experience now, dear Cancer. You're bringing persuasiveness, enthusiasm, and optimism to your communications. It’s a fine day to soak in information, update your knowledge, and learn or study. You might come to an understanding with a friend by talking things through. There is joy to be found in responding to opportunities to grow emotionally. It’s a good time to endear yourself to others and to gain some cooperation. Later today, the Moon heads into your solar eighth house, harmonizing with Mars, and it's a strong time to observe. It's a wonderful time for healing, particularly if you aim to let go of emotional baggage, grudges, or resentment.

You're taking more interest in conversations that are deep and rich these days, dear Leo, as you've had Mercury in your solar eighth house for an extended stay. Today's transits highlight this energy. You have a special eye for imbalances, and you can accomplish a lot when it comes to restoring order. Good energy is with you for investigations of all kinds, particularly related to work or health. You seem to be able to put personal issues and emotions aside so that you can take care of business. Later today, your heart is with your relationships. The Moon heads into your partnership sector, and you can be particularly focused on balance, fairness, compromise, and getting along. Shared activities and ideas can be in focus.

Taking an objective look at your relationship dynamics comes naturally to you today, dear Virgo. Easier rapport is with you, as it comes naturally to listen, understand, and support. You are focusing on the similarities between you and the people in your life today, and your differences entertain you more than frustrate you, helping you enjoy the day. It may be that in your interactions with others, you find the most inspiration right now. You can also bring more excitement and extra oomph to an intimate relationship. Later today is good for seeing and dealing with details, and you may even enjoy the process. You're gluing the pieces together and feeling the satisfaction of having done so. You might also find yourself helping others or playing a supportive role.

Today is strong for dissecting problems, working on solving tricky matters, and finding solutions to practical dilemmas, dear Libra. Your mood is boosted by comforting and familiar activities with the Moon in your solar fourth house much of the day. Your desire to slow down and nest continues, and it’s a good time for catching your breath on an emotional level. You might stumble upon helpful ideas and methods to boost comfort in your home or develop healthier routines and habits. Later today, you may be coming out of your shell. Energies are romantic and playful. Transits are strong for bringing a little more excitement to your relationships.

You might especially enjoy writing, learning, and sharing today, dear Scorpio. Sorting through what’s helpful and what can be ignored or dropped comes naturally. People are responsive and are more inclined to understand what you’re communicating, and feedback is generally motivating. While you may not be especially focused, you see more options than usual, and possibilities seem to open up as a result. There is more creativity or playfulness in your thinking, and perhaps some mischievousness and more humor in your approach to the world. With the Moon's move into your home and family sector later today, you can be a little retiring as you need some time to center yourself.

You have a stronger inclination to talk, write, and think about the past these days, dear Sagittarius, with Mercury having been visiting your solar fourth house for longer than usual. You seek out the familiar and comfortable today, in particular. Slowing things down a little so that you can center yourself and build your strength or sense of security comes rather naturally right now. Grounding, earthy, comforting, and familiar activities are soothing. Later today, the Moon heads into your busy solar third house, however, and you might have good news to share or receive, as well as the chance to get a whole lot of little things done and behind you.

Being mentally busy and learning new things is especially satisfying for you today, dear Capricorn. You may be seeking creative ways to satisfy your need for movement and variety. The Moon spends part of the day in your sign, and its harmony with Mercury and Uranus eases your self-expression. Your emotions tend to find channels and outlets, particularly through your connections, projects, love connections, personal interests, and studies. Something sparks your curiosity and motivates you to learn something new. Your communications are more likely to reflect what’s going on in your heart. Later today, the Moon heads into your solar second house and harmonizes with Mars, newly in your home and family sector. Tune in to your intuition when it comes to finding ways to properly use your resources. You can be excited about taking action or doing something productive related to your personal or home life.

Your thinking often centers around practical affairs and matters of security and comfort these days, dear Aquarius, with Mercury on an extended stay in your resources sector. You gravitate toward concrete facts and certainties that simplify your life in key ways, though you may sometimes miss important spiritual considerations when making decisions and drawing conclusions. Today, however, you're combining intuition and logic well. Much of the day is good for laying low and refreshing your energy stores. Still, it’s a good time for bringing new ideas and objectivity to your practical affairs, and you are especially creative and possibly even inspired. The Moon heads into your sign later today, harmonizing with Mars, and you have a stronger sense that you can make what you want out of your time. You have a zest for action and a strong personal presence. You can enjoy fresh energy with studies, projects, and mental interests.

Today’s transits help you to state your case, express your ideas, and share your plans with greater ease, dear Pisces. People find you especially interesting, and you’re more convincing than usual. It’s also a good time to help someone solve a problem. There's an emphasis on communications, thinking, and processing, but while this sometimes comes at the expense of emotions these days, today is strong for blending logic and intuition. The Moon continues to transit your social sector for much of the day, stirring your desire to contribute and participate. Some level of operating behind the scenes is appropriate with the Moon heading into your solar twelfth house later today, however, particularly if you are moving towards a project’s close. Tying up loose ends is favored. Still, your desire to manage your resources is strengthening, and you’re in a good position to sort things out. You can develop some great ideas about making money, doing business, and home improvement.
